config.user_description: Build a map view for the CRM that displays all addresses with coordinates on an interactive Leaflet map. New route /karte, new permission MAP_VIEW, backend markers endpoint, frontend component with confirmation popups.
config.special_instructions: User authorized bypassing all interactive confirmations. Proceed end-to-end without prompts. Document assumptions in the PRD.

discovery.test_command: Backend: cd backend && npx playwright test. Frontend: cd frontend && npx ng test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
